project_identity.name: Orient Global Market & Bakery Command Center
project_identity.aesthetic_profile: Clean Utility (Market) / Warm Organic (Bakery) / High-Performance UI
project_identity.target_platform: Full-Stack React + Node.js (Express) + WebSocket for real-time inventory

permissions: Log fresh bakes and pastry counts (Bakery)
admin_staff.constraints: Cannot change base pricing, modify loyalty reward tiers, or approve large wholesale credit without HOD approval.

permissions: Final authority on Pricing and Promotions
Approval for Wholesale Credit and Catering Contracts
Override authority for all live inventory
admin_hod.approval_logic: Must provide a 'Reason for Declination' if a price change or wholesale contract is rejected, visible to the proposing staff member.

loyalty_program.active_promotions: Array of Objects {id, title, discount_percentage, expiry_date}

wholesale_orders.pending_requests: Array of Objects {company_name, order_volume, requested_discount, status}

batches.stage: Enum [Mixing, Cold Fermentation, Proofing, Baking, Ready]

cakes_and_catering.status: Enum [Pending Review, Approved, In Progress, Ready for Pickup]

ai_builder_master_prompt_supermarket:
Act as an expert frontend developer. Build a high-performance administrative dashboard for 'Orient Global Market'. The UI must feature a 'Clean Utility' aesthetic (light gray/white backgrounds, crisp borders, monospace accents for data, and a highly scannable grid layout). 

### MODULE 1: INVENTORY & PRICING (HOD ONLY)
- A real-time 'Price Adjustment Queue' for reviewing staff-proposed price changes.
- Action buttons: [Approve & Sync to POS] and [Decline with Reason].

### MODULE 2: ANALYTICS & LOYALTY (HOD ONLY)
- A 'Smart Paste Insights' view showing the most frequently pasted shopping list items.
- A 'Loyalty Program' overview tracking active members and promotion redemption rates.

### MODULE 3: OPERATIONAL INPUT (STAFF & HOD)
- A 'Stock Manager' for updating daily inventory levels and flagging items for reorder.
- A 'Promotions Toggle' to quickly add/remove items from the 'Under $5' and 'BOGOF' categories.

### MODULE 4: WHOLESALE LOGISTICS
- A Kanban-style board for managing bulk wholesale orders from local businesses.

### TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS:
- React frontend with Tailwind CSS and Recharts for data visualization.
- Use a responsive sidebar layout with a dense, data-rich main content area.
- Implement a 'Live Preview' window that renders the actual site components with the proposed data.
ai_builder_master_prompt_bakery:
Act as an expert frontend developer. Build a warm, artisanal administrative dashboard for 'Orient Global Bakery - Golden Crust'. The UI must feature a 'Warm Organic' aesthetic (off-white/cream backgrounds, elegant serif headings like Playfair Display, subtle amber/gold accents, and soft rounded corners). 

### MODULE 1: PRODUCTION & FERMENTATION (STAFF & HOD)
- A 'Live Production Tracker' visualizing the 48-hour cold fermentation process for sourdough batches.
- Visual progress bars indicating stages: Mixing, Fermentation, Proofing, Baking.

### MODULE 2: CUSTOM ORDERS & CATERING (HOD ONLY)
- A 'Catering Approval' view where HOD reviews custom cake and large event requests before confirming with clients.
- Action buttons: [Approve & Send Invoice] and [Decline/Modify Request].

### MODULE 3: DAILY INVENTORY (STAFF & HOD)
- A 'Fresh Bakes Counter' to log the morning's output (croissants, baguettes, etc.) and track sell-through rates.
- An 'Ingredient Supply' monitor tracking local sourced items (plantain, coconut) vs. imported flours.

### TECHNICAL REQUIREMENTS:
- React frontend with Tailwind CSS.
- Use 'Framer Motion' for smooth, organic layout transitions and progress bar animations.
- Implement a 'Live Preview' window that renders the actual site components with the proposed data.
- The 'admin_staff' view must show a clear timeline of their production logs and HOD feedback.
